training.recommendation: Today is best suited for a lower-intensity aerobic workout, prioritizing consistency and knee durability. Consider a low-impact aerobic session, such as cycling or swimming, or an easy run if conditions are ideal.
training.reasoning: Given your recent running frequency and knee durability focus, it's important to maintain aerobic base development with low injury risk. This session should complement your marathon rebuild without overloading.
training.caution: Avoid high impact or intense workouts today to protect knee health.
cooldown: Static stretching for hips and calves
training.optional: Add 10 minutes of core and mobility work if energy permits.
training.skip: Avoid any high-impact or high-intensity running.

alternatives.recommendation: Count surf as the main athletic output; skip the aerobic session and do 10 minutes of hips and calves mobility.
Perform a 25-minute focused mobility and core session.

readiness.note: Without energy and soreness data, maintain a conservative approach focusing on aerobic capacity and knee health.

runningStats.focus: Building aerobic consistency while ensuring knee protection.

liftProgram.why: Focus on upper body and core strength which has been less emphasized recently.

movementMenu.recommendation: Quick dynamic stretch and hip mobility session.
Focused core and mobility workout emphasizing knee health.
Easy cycling or swimming session for low-impact endurance.
